spec: Cross-regional regression of regional extreme-share vote (16 Laender) on regional cumulative price growth, controlling for regional mean income. Same functional form as validation/uk.py::_cross_regional_leave_price_partial_correlation.
interpretation: Raw correlation matches the German held-out moment in moments.py. Partial correlation is the placebo for Adler-Ansell (2020). If the partial correlation is negative, the housing-channel mechanism produces the empirically correct conditional sign in Germany, isolating the UK sign mismatch as country-specific.
